headline: Apollo Group`s interim condensed consolidated financial statements for the Q4 and 12 months of 2025/2026 (unaudited)
summary: Key Developments during Financial Year 2025/2026 During financial year 2025/2026 economic environment in Group’s operating markets remained challenging, especially in Estonia and Finland. Weakened consumer confidence, high unemployment rates and high inflation rates are leading to reduced household purchasing power, what continuously placed downward pressure on consumption volumes.
